fullHistory.content:
Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — your co-pilot for the Unitree G1. Here's what we can do together:

🤖 Motion & Poses
"Wave hello with the right arm"
"Do a graceful bow"
"Strike a T-pose stance"

⚙️ Simulation & Physics
"Simulate walking on uneven terrain"
"Test balance when pushed gently"
"Observe natural arm swing during walking"

🛠️ Customise & Extend
"Add a virtual object to pick up"
"Adjust the stiffness of the joints for softer movements"
"Create a dance routine with multiple poses"
